channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Tonight: Drizzle, Minimum Temperature: 8°C (47°F)
item.description: Minimum Temperature: 8°C (47°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 19mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1006mb, Humidity: 81%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Low, Sunset: 21:23 BST

item.title: Friday: Drizzle, Minimum Temperature: 11°C (52°F) Maximum Temperature: 16°C (61°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 16°C (61°F), Minimum Temperature: 11°C (52°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 11mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1011mb, Humidity: 66%, UV Risk: 4, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 04:59 BST, Sunset: 21:24 BST

item.title: Saturday: Light Rain, Minimum Temperature: 11°C (53°F) Maximum Temperature: 17°C (63°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 17°C (63°F), Minimum Temperature: 11°C (53°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 20mph, Visibility: Moderate, Pressure: 1004mb, Humidity: 81%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 04:58 BST, Sunset: 21:25 BST
